body:

name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: I’m personally asking you to help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
This is the state of the race | Friend --

I hadn't wanted to send this kind of email, but it's imperative that I fill you in on the state of this race as I see it.

Over the winter, our budget team and I worked hard to game out the various scenarios we thought we might face in a general election. What would a race against one of the more traditional Republicans look like? How about a race against Donald Trump?

One assumption seemed pretty safe: That if we were to wind up running against Donald Trump, our supporters, especially our grassroots donors, would be so horrified that they'd step up big time.

It's now been three weeks since Trump became the presumptive Republican nominee, and the fact is that isn't happening yet.

**[So I need you to chip in right now -- and yes, we’ll send you a free sticker when you do.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjU1OTM1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MTUwNjQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

** Don't get me wrong -- you've been amazing. You're the only reason that Hillary Clinton is on the verge of making history. And I have no doubt that many of you are planning to get involved later on, or may be working hard in ways that aren't always visible to the campaign.

But for the time being, our fundraising is actually DOWN slightly from where it was in April. I don't know if it's that you think we don't need the money yet (we do), or that Trump couldn't possibly win (he really, really could), or if you're just exhausted from a long primary (I don't blame you!) -- but whatever your reasons are, I am personally asking you to get up off the bench and help make sure the most extreme, erratic presidential nominee in history never makes it to the White House.

**Will you please make a donation right now?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU1OTM1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MTUwNjQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 to join more than one million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjU1OTM1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODA0MTUwNjQxS0&mt=1&rt=0)

---

| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1.2 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: staff@maggiehassan.com
subject: Link of the Week: Kelly Ayotte comes clean
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about. We hope you'll enjoy clicking around as much as we do._
In a surprisingly honest statement, Kelly Ayotte told a reporter this week...
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd302/2a380d31/13cb92e9/f85b80/1834808897/VEsH/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/want-to-see-a-gop-senator-duck-and-run-ask-about-trump/2016/05/23/d7e1da94-1d18-11e6-8c7b-6931e66333e7_story.html")
It was a moment of honesty, and her record shows that indeed, her priority has always been herself, her political party, and her corporate special interest backers.
From votes to make college more expensive, endanger our clean drinking water, and defund Planned Parenthood, she's repeatedly bowed to the far-right corporate special interests that support her campaign. AND, she's still obstructing the Supreme Court confirmation process. It's not just reporters that Kelly Ayotte's walking away from; it's also her constitutional duty.
You can read more about her accidental honesty [**here**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd302/2a380d31/13cb92e9/f85b80/1834808897/VEsE/ "https://www.washingtonpost.com/politics/want-to-see-a-gop-senator-duck-and-run-ask-about-trump/2016/05/23/d7e1da94-1d18-11e6-8c7b-6931e66333e7_story.html").
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- Congress is supposed to work for our country's families, not just our elected officials. Now that Kelly Ayotte has made it clear who gets top billing (hint: it's herself), we need to fight harder than ever to make sure she doesn't spend another six years in Washington. [**Donate now to help elect Maggie Hassan who will always make you, me, and hard-working families her top priority.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd302/2a380d31/13cb92e9/f85b81/1834808897/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYwNTI3X2xvdHciLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20160527_lotw&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

You can read more about her accidental honesty "". -- Team Maggie P.S. -- Congress is supposed to work for our country's families, not just our elected officials. Now that Kelly Ayotte has made it clear who gets top billing (hint: it's herself), we need to fight harder than ever to make sure she doesn't spend another six years in Washington. "" ""

Friend,

Tonight at midnight is our pre-primary fundraising deadline. That means it's go time.

Along with so many of you, I've worked hard over the last three years to deliver for Montana. I want to make sure that the things that make us great -- access to public land and streams, good public schools, a growing economy -- are there for generations to come.

| **For Immediate Release**
Contact: Brittney Wilson
802-274-2722
**_Phil Scott's 'Green Flag' Tour Has Another Successful Week_**
Montpelier, VT - Phil Scott's statewide Green Flag tour wraps up another successful week by storming into Franklin County.

Scott is visiting all of Vermont’s 14 counties, discussing his plan to strengthen the economy, make Vermont more affordable and make sure the state budget does not grow faster than Vermont’s economy or Vermonters’ income. At each stop, Phil is registering new voters and hearing the concerns of workers and small business owners.

The tour also features 'Blizzard' a small passenger bus, frequently piloted by the candidate, that has been converted into a mobile campaign office.

For more information on our Green Flag Tour, contact Brittney@PhilScott.org.

Friday, May 27th Franklin County

9:00 a.m. Tour of Swanton Lumber

11:30 a.m. Tour of Vermont Precision Tools

1:15 p.m. Meet and Greet, Handy Toyota

2:00 p.m. Meet and Greet with Dairy Farmers
St. Albans Co-op

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Russ Feingold
Date: Wed, May 25, 2016
Subject: Where we stand
[](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42d3/1c469400/55f9305/3564d89/702477457/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")
Friend,
I wanted to give you an update on where we are. I've just wrapped up visiting all of Wisconsin's 72 counties twice. We've put over 40,000 miles on the campaign van and made 324 stops -- including 9 farms, 27 college campuses, and 34 coffee shops!
We're just getting started. In one week, I'm submitting my nomination signatures to officially be on the ballot in November. We're also unveiling our first-ever traveling Campaign HQ -- a 1989 Winnebago that'll be on the road for the next six months delivering yard signs, bumper stickers, and other campaign materials to voters across Wisconsin.
We have the momentum and we can win this, but only with your help. I've set an ambitious goal of raising $50,000 online by May 31\. **[Will you join me by making a $5 contribution before the May 31 deadline?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42d3/1c469400/55f9305/3564d89/702477457/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")**

| [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42d3/1c469400/55f9305/3564d86/702477457/VEsHBA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

Meanwhile, the opposition is getting nervous. Last week, the Koch brothers announced they'll be spending $30 million on Senate ads this year. They've already run $3 million worth of ads against me, piling on along with my opponent and the other outside groups supporting his campaign. And you and I both know that's only the beginning.
**To date, these 10 groups have run ads against me:**
* National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC)
* The U.S. Chamber of Commerce
* Americans for Prosperity (a Koch-backed group)
* Freedom Partners
* Club for Growth
* Wisconsin Alliance for Reform
* Judicial Crisis Network
* America's PAC
* Restoration PAC
* Let America Work

That list might scare you, but it shouldn't intimidate you -- because we're going to hit our goal of raising $50,000 online, and every dollar will be spent making sure Wisconsin voters know the truth about my campaign and Senator Ron Johnson's record. _The only thing we need is you._
**[Help me take on Senator Johnson and the 10 outside groups supporting him. Make a $5 grassroots contribution to my campaign by the May 31 deadline.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf42d3/1c469400/55f9305/3564d89/702477457/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-may-eom?utm_source=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&refcode=ema_2016-05-27_may-eom3_nd&utm_campaign=may-eom1&utm_medium=ema")**
I'm proud of the campaign we're running. And I'll put my grassroots support against Senator Johnson's special interest money any time. Thank you for standing with me every step of the way.
Thanks for all that you're doing,
Russ

Dear Friend,
This weekend marks the unofficial kickoff to summer and for me, that means three months of traveling across the state to meet Missourians at county fairs, parades, and community events. While I'm on the road, our team of volunteers will be knocking on doors and making phone calls to talk with neighbors about the issues most important to them.
This work is the backbone of our campaign, but we can't do it without you. Our May fundraising deadline is quickly approaching and it is critical that we don't fall behind. We still need to raise $4,300 to meet our online goal before May 31. **[Will you chip in $20 or more today to help build this campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/6615652165086480384/-5915620446681298944?utm_campaign=fnd_eom1_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=koster&refcode=em16_160527_fnd_gq_eom1_ful__ck)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: Your Campaign Update
body:
| | | _**Week in Action**_
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive1.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f633596430&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| Greetings,
---
| Phil and Team Scott continued to tour the state this week, meeting with Vermonters, checking out Vermont small businesses, and supporting our vets. A few highlights from the week are included below.

**2016 VERMONT REPUBLICAN STATE CONVENTION**
Phil addressed Republican leaders, legislators and supporters from around the state at this year’s Vermont Republican State Convention on Saturday, where he shared his vision for Vermont’s future.

We face many challenges created by the current administration, but Phil sees a bright future for the state. As Governor, Phil would work with legislators and all state agencies to reverse the growing crisis of affordability, revitalize our economy, and restore faith and trust in state government. As he said, Vermont can be one of the most diverse, vibrant and sustainable economies in the world – with the right leadership.

Phil commended his fellow Republican legislators on their work to stop numerous pieces of irresponsible legislation as the minority party. They didn’t have the numbers this session to pass much-needed pro-growth, pro-economy legislation, but together, we can change that for the next term.

Watch Phil’s entire speech [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0895cf1d91&e=19cebfe173) to learn more about his plans to bring change to Montpelier, restore growth that expands the middle class and lifts wages, and prioritize investments in pro-growth economic policies.
Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT
**RESTORING FAITH & TRUST**
Vermonters are tired of disengaged leadership, and we can no longer afford it. We need a Governor who listens to the people. Phil is a leader who understands that transparency and accountability matter, and that Vermonters deserve to be given the full story on critical matters. A Phil Scott administration will reinstate these pillars of good government to restore faith and trust.

Watch and share the video below to learn more about how Phil will approach leadership to repair the damage and restore your faith and trust in government.
| Phil Scott for Vermont: Restoring Faith in Vermont's Government[](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ezDWP3bA8Wc)| **81 views
---

*******

**FIGHTING FOR VERMONTERS**
Phil is a leader who demands accountability and has consistently challenged state leaders who look to circumvent rules, or take action that is not in the best interest of Vermonters.

When he and other Republican legislators heard reports that State agencies and departments are considering transferring Gov. Shumlin’s exempt appointees into full-time classified positions, they took action. Along with Sen. Joe Benning, and Rep. Don Turner, Phil demanded an immediate halt to the improper re-classification of exempt appointees.

This is not good government, and Phil will fight for what is right for Vermont. Click [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=41cbeef566&e=19cebfe173) to read the official letter, and click [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ae4cf88c76&e=19cebfe173) to read more from WCAX.

***

**THANK A VET MOTORCYCLE RIDE A HUGE SUCCESS**
Phil and Team Scott offer a huge thank you to the hundreds of Vermonters who joined us from around the state in support of veterans’ charities for the Thank a Vet Motorcycle Ride in honor of Armed Services Day. Proceeds raised at the event benefitted the Josh Pallotta Fund, dedicated to helping veterans with PTSD, and the Friends of Veterans Organization, which helps veterans to avoid homelessness.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

*******

**GREEN FLAG TOUR ROLLS ON**
Team Scott made stops in Orange and Orleans and Franklin Counties this week as part of its 14-county _Green Flag Tour._ The team is helping register Vermonters to vote, and meeting with residents to learn more about their challenges and the issues that matter most to them.

In Orange County, Phil’s stops included Champlain Valley Equipment, and the Randolph Herald.

Photo Credit: Phil Scott For Vermont [Facebook Page](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=d57eeaa3aa&e=19cebfe173)

In Orleans County, Phil got the chance to tour Ethan Allen Furniture and Poulin Grain, talking with employees and owners about how he can build a stronger economy for businesses like them.

Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT

Next week Team Scott will be in [Vergennes](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=01ed7b4bad&e=19cebfe173) and [Colchester](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3163ea74f4&e=19cebfe173). Check out our full listing of events [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=5ca5f62f62&e=19cebfe173).

***

**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

_Phil: Let’s get government working for Vermonters again_
“Legislators in Montpelier just don’t get it. They just don’t connect the dots...The measure [to limit legislative sessions to 90 days] would be so valuable for so many reasons, one of which is to get regular people to run – the kind of people who sign the front of a check instead of the back.” (Source: Valley News: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=de418860ec&e=19cebfe173))

_Honoring Graduates of the Vermont Police Academy_
“I see Vermont’s police officers tackling massive challenges every single day. From our opiate crisis and the ripple effects of that, to train derailments, traffic safety, acts of violence that have rocked our entire state — you were there and you will be on the front lines." (Source: Times Argus: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=b28ca66843&e=19cebfe173))

***

**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

_Burlington Free Press: Most Vermont towns losing population_
UVM Economics Professor Art Woolf provides an in-depth look at our population losses and variation across counties. Professor Woolf points out that more than two-thirds of Vermont’s cities and towns have fewer residents today than they did in 2010, and even growth in Chittenden County has been, for the most part, negligible. Our population decline is a serious problem, decreasing our workforce and increasing the tax burden on those of us who remain. As Phil has said, we need to set a clear goal for population growth so we make Vermont more affordable for working families, and strengthen our economy to keep and attract more businesses. Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=8e7dedacce&e=19cebfe173) and learn more about how Phil will work to build a strong economy to combat our workforce and population issues [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=49ac3276ef&e=19cebfe173).

Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4e6737aad4&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bb0d1e71ea&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

Read the full article and learn more about how Phil will work to build a strong economy to combat our workforce and population issues . Thanks to everyone that came out to events and participated in meetings this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – and . name: Jeff Weaver, BernieSanders.com
subject: bumping this
body:
I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see the email Bernie sent yesterday.
In just four days we're going to close the books on the final fundraising deadline of the Democratic primary. **We 're down just two points in California and a victory there would send an unmistakable message of support for our campaign ahead of the Democratic convention.** Russ Feingold also has a fundraising deadline on the same day and Bernie is very committed to helping him win as well. That's why we have to ask:
[**Split a $2.70 contribution to Bernie 2016 and Russ Feingold 's campaign and we're going to win California, and elect a great progressive to the U.S. Senate in Wisconsin.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")
From the White House to the Congress and state capitals across the country, we need to elect leaders who share our values. That's why your contribution is so important.
All my best,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")**

* * *

[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")

Sisters and Brothers -
There are few people who have done more to address the obscene proliferation of money in politics than Russ Feingold.
**There is also no one the Koch brothers want to keep out of the U.S. Senate more than Russ Feingold.**
Russ is running to win a seat in the Senate from Republican Ron Johnson, someone who was called the Koch brothers' "model legislator."
Russ Feingold is someone we need in the Senate, and I'm proud to endorse his campaign. **Can you join me in helping elect Russ Feingold?**
[**Split a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Russ Feingold before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the primary to show that we can elect senators who don't need big money in politics.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")
Let me tell you a little about what made Russ so effective when he was in the Senate. Russ was the sole vote in the Senate against the USA Patriot Act in 2001. He opposed the war in Iraq, he fought disastrous trade deals and worked to reform our health care system. Russ was also an author of the McCain-Feingold Act to reform our corrupt campaign finance system.
Meanwhile, his Republican opponent credits a Koch brothers organization with inspiring him to run for Senate in the first place. Ron Johnson wants to privatize veterans' health care and even said he supports Donald Trump as the Republican nominee.
**Russ has already faced a huge influx of big money trying to keep him out of the Senate.** In fact, the Koch brothers had their ads from a $2 million campaign against Russ taken off the air by TV stations when they were noted to be "false, misleading, and deceptive."
That won't be the last time the Koch brothers try to take out Russ. We need to make sure that Russ can fight back and win.
[**Please make a $2.70 contribution between Bernie 2016 and Russ Feingold before our final FEC fundraising deadline of the primary to show the billionaire class that they can't buy our elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/feingold-for-senate?refcode=em160527")**

Paid for by Bernie 2016

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Eric Hyers
subject: FW: Go Time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

With eight hours to go before our pre-primary deadline tonight, I hope you'll take a minute to read Steve's note if you haven't yet.

He's right -- it's go time. We'll be making critical spending decisions on things like TV buys and radio ads, even upping our yard sign and bumper sticker orders based on whether we're hitting our financial benchmarks. Reaching our fundraising goals has a direct impact on putting Steve in the best position to win.

**[Please donate $25 before midnight. It matters.
](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=tLAF8bTa41SYhDEOSXlr3gVGfTAF9Oyc)**
Thanks,

Eric Hyers
Campaign Manager

_\---- Original Message ----
From: Steve Bullock
Subject: Go Time_

Friend --

Tonight at midnight is our pre-primary fundraising deadline. That means it's go time.

Along with so many of you, I've worked hard over the last three years to deliver for Montana. I want to make sure that the things that make us great -- access to public land and streams, good public schools, a growing economy -- are there for generations to come.

But right now Greg Gianforte and his allies in Washington, D.C. are spending big to distract from the real issues by attacking me. I'm counting on you to make sure it doesn't go unanswered.

**Asking for money is my least favorite part of running for reelection but I need your help today.[We're $734 short, please donate $25 now.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kKVhvlnzc0A1pkjb9E953TPDDA1WckW5)**

Thanks,
Steve Bullock
